zh.Duxbury, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾度波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Standish於1256年出生在英國藍卡爾度波利時，他的父親Thurston de Standish57歲，母親Margaret of Standish30歲。他和Mrs Robert Standish至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1301年5月之前在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什，埋葬在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什。

zh-hans.Duxbury, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾度波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Standish于1256年出生在英国藍卡爾度波利时，他的父亲Thurston de Standish57岁，母亲Margaret of Standish30岁。他和Mrs Robert Standish至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1301年5月之前在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什，埋葬在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Standish was born in 1256, in Duxbury, Lancashire, England, his father, Thurston de Standish, was 57 and his mother, Margaret of Standish, was 30. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Mrs Robert Standish. He died before May 1301, in Standish, Lancashire, England, and was buried in Standish, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Standish est né en 1256, à Duxbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thurston de Standish, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Margaret of Standish, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Mrs Robert Standish. Il est décédé avant mai 1301, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Standish 1256 in Duxbury, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thurston de Standish 57 und seine Mutter Margaret of Standish 30. Er hatte mit Mrs Robert Standish mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor Mai 1301 in Standish, Lancashire, England und wurde in Standish, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Standish è nato il nel 1256 nel Duxbury, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thurston de Standish, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Margaret of Standish, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Mrs Robert Standish. Morì prima del maggio 1301, nel Standish, Lancashire, England, e fu sepolto a Standish, Lancashire, England.

ja.Standish, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュ
ja.Duxbury, Lancashire, England: イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアダクスブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Standishが1256年にイギリスランカシュアイアダクスブリーで生まれた時，父Thurston de Standishは57歳，母Margaret of Standishは30歳であった。彼はMrs Robert Standishとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1301年5月以前にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Standish(이)가 1256년 영국 랭카실르 드스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thurston de Standish(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret of Standish(은)는 30세였다. 그는 Mrs Robert Standish(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1301년 5월 이전 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에 묻혔다.

mn.Duxbury, Lancashire, England: Duxbury, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Standish nasceu em 1256, em Duxbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thurston de Standish, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Margaret of Standish, tinha 30 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Mrs Robert Standish. Ele faleceu antes maio de 1301, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Standish родился в 1256 г. в местности дуксбури, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thurston de Standish было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret of Standish, 30. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Mrs Robert Standish. Он умер перед май 1301 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия и был похоронен в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Standish nació en 1256, en Duxbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thurston de Standish, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Margaret of Standish, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Mrs Robert Standish. Murió antes de mayo de 1301, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
